led-panel-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
led-panel-api/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; without this change, the build would still target Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and potentially causing incompatibility with libraries requiring Java 21.
